summary: Dream Debt Calculator for Wishlist section testing complete. All backend endpoints work correctly, frontend ISO tab with WISHLIST filter and Dream Debt card render correctly.
seed_data_creation: Existing TEST_Frontend_Album with WISHLIST status used for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dream Debt Calculator fully tested. Backend: GET /api/valuation/wishlist returns total_value, valued_count, total_count for WISHLIST ISO items. Frontend: ISO tab on /honeypot page has WISHLIST filter option, Dream Debt card renders with 'Total Value of Your Dreams: $X' copy and 'You've got expensive taste, babe. Start playing the lottery.' editorial text. Certified Delusional badge appears when total_value > $5000 (not visible in test since value was $0.00).

backend: test_get_iso_items_endpoint - GET /api/iso returns user's ISO items
test_iso_items_have_status_field - ISO items have OPEN/WISHLIST/FOUND status
test_wishlist_items_from_iso_endpoint - Can filter ISO items by WISHLIST status
test_move_to_wishlist_creates_wishlist_iso - Moving record to wishlist creates ISO with WISHLIST status
test_wishlist_count_matches_iso_filter - Valuation total_count matches ISO WISHLIST count
frontend: WISHLIST filter option present in ISO tab filter bar
Dream Debt card renders with correct 'Total Value of Your Dreams' text
Editorial copy 'You've got expensive taste, babe. Start playing the lottery.' displays
Wishlist section renders below Dream Debt card
Wishlist items render as ISOCards with WISHLIST badge
OPEN filter shows 'No results' when no OPEN ISOs exist
All 4 filter options present: All, OPEN, WISHLIST, FOUND
Certified Delusional badge NOT visible (correct - value < $5000)
